title: FL door sprint — CANDIDATE_ACQUISITION_RECOMMENDED + PHYSICAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED

locked_configuration.summary: 2019 Ford F-450 Chassis Cab Regular Cab 4x2 DRW 145.3 WB / 60 CA

reason: Outlines 2D listing provides a real URL for Regular Cab Chassis Cab 60 CA DRW exterior baseline. Commercial 3D lacks door internals. Shell interchange with F-150 is a crossover candidate only until locally hashed. Physical teardown/scan required for harness routing and inner structure.
decision: Acquire SRC-CAND-000004 / EDTS-CAND-001 (Outlines vector) as Priority reference baseline after purchase.
Keep EDTS-CAND-002 / CAND-000042-EOG as visual candidate; do not treat as CAD-grade or inner-structure truth.
CL-001 shell interchange remains DISCOVERED_NOT_LOCALLY_HASHED / COMPARISON_REFERENCE — not silo geometry truth.
Flag PHYSICAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for FL door internals, harness routing, latch geometry.
Contamination guards: 2020+ facelift harness, cab-type trim/harness, mirror-option pinouts.
Do not update passport geometry/interaction from ABSENT; no GEO promotion; kernel/passport rc1 unchanged.
Hard Rule 13: acquisition of Outlines triggers parallel parts/service/visual lanes — does not close research.
